About Empire Scaffolding

A family-run scaffolding company built on experience, safety, and reliability

Empire Scaffolding (GB) Ltd is a family-run company established in 2000, specialising in the supply, erection, and dismantling of scaffolding for commercial, domestic, and industrial projects. Based in Hucknall, Nottinghamshire, we are ideally located to deliver scaffolding services nationwide.

↗

60+ CISRS-Qualified Staff

Over 60 directly employed, CISRS-qualified professionals delivering safe, reliable scaffolding on every project.

Established 2000

25 years of experience across commercial, domestic, and industrial scaffolding projects throughout the UK.

● Our Services

Reliable scaffolding services for every project

Traditional Tube & Fit Scaffolding

Standard scaffolding for various commercial, domestic, and industrial construction needs.

Full Supply, Erection & Dismantling

We handle all stages of scaffolding work, from initial supply through to safe dismantling.

Projects of Any Size

From small domestic towers to large-scale high-rise commercial buildings.

Plettac System Scaffolding

Modular system scaffolding suitable for complex or high-rise projects.

Commercial, domestic, and industrial scaffolding across the UK

5.0/5
★ ★ ★ ★ ★
Based on Customer Reviews
Why Choose Us

Why Contractors and Clients Choose Empire Scaffolding

Safety First

Fully insured with comprehensive safety protocols and certified equipment on every project.

Reliable Service

On-time delivery and professional installation by experienced, CISRS-qualified teams.

Get a free quote today - call 0115 9641 600

Expert Team

Over 60 directly employed scaffolding professionals with years of hands-on industry experience.

25 Years. Proven Track Record.

Established in 2000, we have delivered scaffolding solutions for landmark projects across the Midlands and throughout the UK.

Recent Projects

A look at some of our recent projects.

/Nottingham

Council House Dome

Complex scaffolding solution for historic civic building restoration, providing safe access for dome maintenance and architectural preservation work.

Our Testimonials

Client experiences that reflect our excellence

What our clients say about our construction services reflects our commitment to quality workmanship, timely project delivery, and transparent communication.

“The team delivered exceptional quality and maintained complete transparency throughout the project. The construction was completed on time, and the finishing exceeded our workmanship and strong project management and the finishing exceeded our workmanship and strong project management.”

Ghost Hunter

Verified Customer

Trusted by leading organisations across construction, education, and the public sector

OUR ACCREDITATIONS & MEMBERSHIPS

Accredited. Certified. Trusted.

NASC

National Access and Scaffolding Confederation - the leading trade association for the access and scaffolding industry, ensuring safety and professional standards.

CHAS

Contractors Health and Safety Assessment Scheme - health and safety pre-qualification demonstrating full compliance with industry standards.

SMAS

Safety Management Advisory Services - independent health and safety assessment scheme providing assurance of contractor competence and compliance.

Builders Profile

Verified contractor profile ensuring financial stability and professional competence across the construction industry.

Construction Line

Pre-qualification service for construction contractors, ensuring compliance, capability, and readiness to deliver.

ISO 9001

ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management certification - international standard ensuring consistent, high-quality service delivery on every project.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about our scaffolding services.

A few quick answers about how we work, where we operate, and what to expect when you work with Empire Scaffolding.

We provide traditional tube and fit scaffolding, Plettac system scaffolding, and bespoke solutions for commercial, domestic, and industrial projects of any size.

We are based in Hucknall, Nottinghamshire and operate throughout the Midlands and across the UK. We provide UK-wide quotations for larger projects.

Yes. We have over 60 directly employed CISRS-qualified staff, ensuring every project is delivered safely and to the highest professional standards.

We work on everything from small domestic jobs to large-scale high-rise commercial projects. No project is too big or too small.

Call us on 0115 9641 600 or use the contact form below and we'll get back to you promptly with a full quotation.

GET A QUOTE

Tell us about your project.

By submitting this form you agree to us processing your details to respond to your enquiry. Your information is handled securely and in line with our Privacy Policy.

A family-run scaffolding company built on experience, safety, and reliability

Empire Scaffolding (GB) Ltd is a family-run company established in 2000, specialising in the supply, erection, and dismantling of scaffolding for commercial, domestic, and industrial projects. Based in Hucknall, Nottinghamshire, we are ideally located to deliver scaffolding services nationwide.

PR

Latest news and achievements

Building Awards Recognition

Nottingham Castle refurbishment project shortlisted at prestigious building awards

Read More

Major Milestone Achieved

15km of scaffolding removed as Nottingham Castle renovation reaches major milestone

Read More

Scale That Speaks Volumes

From towering commercial complexes to intricate residential projects, witness the magnitude and precision of our scaffolding solutions.

Nottingham City Council

From skyline visions to street-level precision - watch our team bring structure to the city with scaffolding solutions built for impact.

Duration: 0:57

40-Stroy Project

Sherwood Observatory

Watch our team construct a new build at Sherwood Observatory using traditional tube and fit scaffolding, delivering precision and safety for this landmark project.

Duration: 1:12

New Build Project

OUR ACCREDITATIONS & MEMBERSHIPS

Accredited. Certified. Trusted.

NASC

CHAS

Contractors Health and Safety Assessment Scheme - health and safety pre-qualification demonstrating full compliance with industry standards.

SMAS

Builders Profile

Verified contractor profile ensuring financial stability and professional competence across the construction industry.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about our scaffolding services.

A few quick answers about how we work, where we operate, and what to expect when you work with Empire Scaffolding.

We provide traditional tube and fit scaffolding, Plettac system scaffolding, and bespoke solutions for commercial, domestic, and industrial projects of any size.

We are based in Hucknall, Nottinghamshire and operate throughout the Midlands and across the UK. We provide UK-wide quotations for larger projects.

Yes. We have over 60 directly employed CISRS-qualified staff, ensuring every project is delivered safely and to the highest professional standards.

We work on everything from small domestic jobs to large-scale high-rise commercial projects. No project is too big or too small.

Call us on 0115 9641 600 or use the contact form below and we'll get back to you promptly with a full quotation.
